critique:
Critique:
Step 1 is incorrect. The function f_select_column is intended to retain only the columns relevant to answering the question (e.g., focusing on the "score" column to compare Europe vs USA). Using f_select_column(*) keeps all columns and does not perform any meaningful selection, misapplying the function’s purpose.
